# LLM documentation for www.embednotionpages.com

Embed your Notion pages into your website with a simple iframe. Full customisation, password protection & more. Free plan available.

## URLs
- [Embed Notion Pages](/) - Embed your Notion pages into your website with a simple iframe. Full customisation, password protection & more. Free plan available.
- [Notion Site Password Protect | Embed Notion Pages](/notion-password-protect) - Protect your embedded Notion pages with a password. Share them only with the right people and keep your content private. Free plan available.
- [The New Notion Embed & iFrame Feature][/blog/notion-feature-iframe-embed](/blog/notion-feature-iframe-embed) - In February 2025, Notion launched a new feature: you can now embed Notion pages and forms into websites using iframes.
- [How to Embed a Notion Page Into Your Website](/blog/embed-notion-page-into-website) - Recently, it's become very easy to embed a Notion page into your website. Instead of copy and paste, you can link your Notion page directly to your website.
- [How to Add a Password to a Notion Page](/blog/password-protect-notion-page) - Notion doesn't let you add passwords to pages yet. To protect your content, you'll need a workaround.
- [Notion Cover Size & Dimensions](/blog/notion-cover-sizes) - Choosing the right size makes your Notion page clean and sharp.
- [How to Embed a Notion Form on Your Website](/blog/embed-notion-form-on-website) - Embedding a Notion form into your website lets you collect responses directly in your Notion workspace, simplifying data collection and improving visitor interaction with your content.
- [Notion for Teams: Best Practices for Enhancing Teamwork and Streamlining Projects](/blog/notion-for-teams-best-practices-for-enhancing-teamwork-and-streamlining-projects) - Notion has emerged as a powerful productivity tool that transforms the way teams collaborate and manage projects.
- [How to Use Notion for Academic Research and Study Planning: A Step-by-Step Guide](/blog/use-notion-for-academic-research-and-study-planning) - Notion has become a versatile tool for students and academics who seek an organized approach to manage their research and study schedules.
- [Use these Notion templates to run your life](/blog/templates-to-run-your-life-with-notion) - Notion is a versatile tool that can be used for a variety of purposes, from taking notes and tracking to-dos to managing a blog editorial calendar. And while it's great for more traditional uses, there are also many unconventional ways to use Notion.
